name: Buried Strongbox
description: Half-sunk in the hillside, an iron strongbox pokes from the loose earth. Someone hid it here — and its lock is still fast.

discovery.message: Something metal glints in the disturbed earth of the hillside — a buried strongbox.

strongbox.text: The strongbox is bound in rusted iron and secured by a heavy tumbler lock. It won't open easily.

pick-check.text: You work the picks into the tumbler, feeling for the pins.
pick-check.success_text: The last pin gives with a soft click. The lid swings free.
pick-check.failure_text: A pin slips and the mechanism resets. The lock holds — try again.

force-check.text: You wedge a bar under the lid and heave.
force-check.success_text: Metal shrieks and the hasp tears loose — but the jolt shatters something inside.
force-check.failure_text: The lid won't budge, and the strain leaves you winded.

clean-open.text: Inside: a purse of coin and a gemstone wrapped in oilcloth, untouched.

forced-open.text: Inside: a purse of coin. Whatever fragile thing was packed beside it is now so much glittering dust.

leave.text: You leave the strongbox where it lies.
